MYC.description: MYC transcription factor; amplified downstream of KRAS

TP53.description: TP53 guardian of genome; 0=lost/mutated (common in PDAC)

CDKN2A.description: CDKN2A/p16 CDK inhibitor; 0=deleted (nearly universal in PDAC)

RB1.description: RB1 retinoblastoma protein; cell cycle checkpoint

BCL_XL.description: BCL-XL anti-apoptotic protein; upregulated in drug resistance

BAX.description: BAX pro-apoptotic protein; activated by TP53

ZEB1.description: ZEB1 EMT transcription factor; represses CDH1

CDH1.description: E-cadherin epithelial marker; lost during EMT

TGFB1_expr.description: TGF-beta1 gene expression level (drives tgfb secretion)

SHH_expr.description: Sonic Hedgehog gene expression level (drives shh secretion)

HIF1A.description: HIF-1alpha; activated under hypoxia, drives anaerobic adaptation

drug_sensitivity.description: Drug kill coefficient [0,1]; reduced by ABCB1/BCL_XL

apoptosis_threshold.description: Stress threshold above which apoptosis is induced

parent_id.description: Parent tumor cell identifier; -1 for founders

emt_signal_time.description: Fix B: accumulated time induction_signal has exceeded emt_induction_threshold

number_of_tumor_cells.description: Number of tumor cells placed in cluster at domain center

number_of_stromal_cells.description: Number of PSCs placed in annular ring around tumor

tumor_cluster_radius.description: Radius of initial tumor cell cluster centered at origin

stroma_inner_radius.description: Inner radius of PSC seeding annulus

stroma_outer_radius.description: Outer radius of PSC seeding annulus

mechanics_voxel_size.description: Cell mechanics container voxel size (Cell_Container resolution)

tgfb_activation_threshold.description: Minimum tgfb concentration to trigger stromal CAF activation

shh_activation_threshold.description: Minimum shh concentration to activate GLI1 in stromal cells

oxygen_necrosis_threshold.description: Oxygen level below which necrosis rate is upregulated

oxygen_hypoxia_threshold.description: Oxygen level below which HIF1A is activated

drug_start_time.description: Simulation time at which drug Dirichlet BCs are enabled (t=7200 = day 5)

calibration_profile.description: Tumor calibration profile (AsPC-1 default, PANC-1 for Knob 2 comparator)

tumor_calibration_knobs_json.description: Path to tumor calibration profiles JSON

hif1a_tgfb_amplification_factor.description: Multiplier applied to tumor TGFB secretion when hif1a_active=1

contact_inhibition_threshold.description: Mechanical pressure threshold above which tumor proliferation is arrested

drug_kill_coefficient.description: Maps effective intracellular drug to apoptosis rate contribution

efflux_drug_reduction.description: Fractional reduction in effective drug when abcb1_active=1

ecm_production_rate_base.description: ECM production rate for activated CAFs when gli1_active=0

ecm_production_rate_boosted.description: ECM production rate for activated CAFs when gli1_active=1

ecm_ha_fraction_default.description: Default HA fraction of newly produced ECM

mmp2_degradation_rate.description: ECM degradation rate for mmp2_active tumor cells

ecm_natural_decay_rate.description: Slow background ECM turnover (handled outside per-cell Module 6)

drug_uptake_rate.description: Intracellular drug accumulation rate per local drug concentration

drug_stress_threshold.description: Intracellular drug level threshold for NRF2 activation

nrf2_decay_rate.description: Slow NRF2 decay rate when drug stress is removed

hif1a_nrf2_priming_bonus.description: Stress-signal bonus under hypoxia for earlier NRF2 activation

hif1a_emt_boost.description: Additive EMT induction boost when hif1a_active=1

motility_mesenchymal_low.description: Tumor mesenchymal motility at LOW EMT extent

motility_mesenchymal_med.description: Tumor mesenchymal motility at MEDIUM EMT extent

motility_mesenchymal_high.description: Tumor mesenchymal motility at HIGH EMT extent

adhesion_mesenchymal_low.description: Tumor mesenchymal adhesion at LOW EMT extent

adhesion_mesenchymal_med.description: Tumor mesenchymal adhesion at MEDIUM EMT extent

adhesion_mesenchymal_high.description: Tumor mesenchymal adhesion at HIGH EMT extent

compaction_ecm_increment.description: Passive ECM density increment per solid-stress unit per step

crowding_base_pressure.description: Additive crowding baseline so contact inhibition fires even without ECM

ecm_emt_threshold.description: ECM density below which ECM-EMT boost is zero

ecm_emt_ramp.description: Width of smooth ramp above ecm_emt_threshold (gate goes 0->1 over this range)

ecm_emt_strength.description: Scaling factor for ECM-EMT boost (multiplied by gate)

ecm_emt_cap.description: Maximum ECM-EMT boost added to induction_signal

emt_death_increase.description: Fix A: additional apoptosis rate for EMT (zeb1_active=1) cells

emt_off_threshold.description: Fix B: induction_signal below which EMT reverts (hysteresis; must be less than emt_induction_threshold)

emt_activation_delay.description: Fix B: minutes signal must exceed emt_induction_threshold before EMT activates

ecm_emt_require_caf_contact.description: Fix C: if >0.5, ECM-EMT boost only applies when an activated CAF neighbor is present

ecm_motility_block_threshold.description: Fix D: ECM density at which EMT motility drops to zero (linear ramp)

host_death_ceiling.description: Max live tumor cells before simulation halts (safety valve)
